title: ReimbouModpackV2
description: ReimbouModpackV2 is a modpack packed with a wide variety of mods, perfect for enhancing exploration, adventure, and multiplayer in Minecraft.
body:
ReimbouModpackV2 is a modpack designed for casual players who love exploration and adventure. Featuring a diverse selection of mods like Alex's Caves, Cataclysm, Aquamirae, Call of Yucatan, When Dungeons Arise, and Deeper and Darker.

This modpack is not compatible with vanilla servers (client and server-side mods). With a minimum of 8GB of RAM recommended, this modpack offers exploration and adventure mods for casual players.

(Chunk loading may be slow in singleplayer mode)
